events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! The Queen legend's iconic guitar work has inspired generations. What's your favourite Queen riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Mick Jagger is 83 today! The iconic Rolling Stones frontman continues to defy age with his incredible energy and stage presence. Here's to the rock 'n' roll legend.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with the ironically titled 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles. Thankfully, radio is still very much alive and kicking!

events.title: Oasis's 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop history.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Remembering the era-defining debut from Oasis, 'Definitely Maybe', released in 1994. Which track takes you straight back to the height of Britpop?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music and Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, bringing together nearly half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since the legendary Woodstock Festival. A moment in history that truly defined a generation. What's your favourite memory from the music of '69?

events.title: Tribute to Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us on August 16, 1977. His music continues to resonate across the world.

events.title: Tupac Shakur remembrance
events.blurb: On September 7, 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas, tragically passing away on September 13, 1996. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Legacy of Tupac
angles.copy: Remembering the profound impact of Tupac Shakur. His music and words continue to be a powerful voice for many.

events.title: Tribute to Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Remembering guitar icon Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: On this day, we pay tribute to the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: It's an unofficial celebration of The Beatles' 'Abbey Road', released in 1969. That album cover is still one of the most famous in music history!

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Rock Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders icon continues to command the stage and airwaves. What's your favourite Pretenders track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation and a true rock 'n' roll star.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, and in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: A Song For Peace
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon's powerful message with 'Imagine', released as a single in the UK in 1975. A song that still resonates deeply today.

events.title: First iPod released (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: It's been 25 years since the original iPod changed the game! A tiny device that held '1,000 songs in your pocket'. Who remembers their first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to thrilling gadgets, what's your favourite Bond film or song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering A Legend
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the incredible life and music of John Lennon. His legacy continues to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is timeless.

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Wonders
angles.copy: Celebrating The Beatles' groundbreaking 'White Album', released in 1968. A truly eclectic and influential collection of songs. What are your standout tracks?
